purpose: Validates and lists character disciplines (innate disciplines only). This agent does NOT handle paths or rituals - use PathsAgent and RitualsAgent for those systems.

primary.name: character_disciplines
primary.notes: Only contains innate disciplines. Paths and rituals are stored in separate tables (character_paths, character_rituals) and are handled by other agents.

primary.name: character_discipline_powers
primary.notes: Stores individual powers for each discipline. Power level must not exceed discipline level.

secondary.name: characters
secondary.notes: Used to determine character's clan for access rule validation.

functions.name: listCharacterDisciplines
functions.description: List a character's innate disciplines (excludes paths/rituals).

disciplines.description: Array of discipline data with powers

sql_examples: SELECT discipline_name, level FROM character_disciplines WHERE character_id = ?;
exclusion_notes: Filters out any discipline names starting with 'Path of'
Excludes disciplines found in character_paths table
Excludes disciplines found in character_rituals table

updates.description: Object mapping discipline names to levels

functions.name: validateClanDisciplineAccess
functions.description: Validate clan access rules for a discipline.

hasAccess.description: Whether character has access to discipline

validation_rules: Checks character's clan from characters table
Compares discipline against clan's in-clan disciplines

functions.name: validateDisciplinePowers

requested_powers.description: Object mapping discipline names to arrays of power names

validation_rules: Character must have dots in discipline
Power level must not exceed discipline level

key_principles: character_disciplines contains only innate disciplines; paths/rituals are in separate tables.
All methods explicitly filter out paths and rituals.
Paths are identified by 'Path of' prefix or presence in character_paths table.
Rituals are identified by presence in character_rituals table.
Clan access rules are defined in config/settings.json.
exclusion_strategy: Repository level: DisciplineRepository filters out path/ritual patterns
Agent level: All public methods explicitly exclude paths/rituals
related_agents: PathsAgent - Handles Thaumaturgy paths and other paths
